summary: App with admin panel access restricted to a single user account (TailsTheBeast124), who has exclusive admin privileges.
architectural_notes: Only the account 'TailsTheBeast124' is allowed to log in; all other accounts are restricted.
TailsTheBeast124 has exclusive access to the Admin panel.

existing_features.title: In AuthGate.tsx, enforce that only the user whose username is 'TailsTheBeast124' can proceed past the authentication gate. Any authenticated Internet Identity user whose resolved username is not 'TailsTheBeast124' must be shown the AccessDeniedScreen immediately after login, before any app content is rendered. This restriction must apply regardless of onboarding state or account type.
